======== PHASE 2A: WIPE SAKURA TELEGRAM (vm-hermes .202) ========
--- Stop gateway ---
--- Delete webhook registration with Telegram (so old token is fully unregistered) ---
webhook deleted: True
--- Remove ALL telegram env vars from service file ---
telegram env vars removed from service file
--- Remove telegram section from config.yaml ---
telegram section removed from config.yaml
--- Wipe all sessions, state, logs ---
sessions, state, logs cleared
--- Wipe channel directory ---
--- Reload systemd ---
SAKURA WIPE COMPLETE

======== PHASE 2B: WIPE REMY TELEGRAM (vm-openclaw .199) ========
--- Stop openclaw gateway ---
--- Delete webhook/polling for current Remy token ---
webhook deleted: True
--- Remove telegram channel from openclaw.json entirely ---
telegram removed from openclaw.json: True
--- Clear openclaw sessions, state, logs ---
openclaw logs and sessions cleared
REMY WIPE COMPLETE
